---
title: "Advanced Curves"
format: html
filters:
  - arrows
---

## Simple Curve Parameter

Use `curve` (0-1) instead of manually specifying control points. Higher values create more pronounced curves.

### Straight (curve=0)

```markdown
{{</* arrow from="50,50" to="250,50" curve="0" */>}}
```

{{< arrow from="50,50" to="250,50" curve="0" >}}

### Subtle Curve (curve=0.3)

```markdown
{{</* arrow from="50,50" to="250,50" curve="0.3" */>}}
```

{{< arrow from="50,50" to="250,50" curve="0.3" >}}

### Medium Curve (curve=0.5)

```markdown
{{</* arrow from="50,50" to="250,50" curve="0.5" */>}}
```

{{< arrow from="50,50" to="250,50" curve="0.5" >}}

### Strong Curve (curve=0.8)

```markdown
{{</* arrow from="50,50" to="250,50" curve="0.8" */>}}
```

{{< arrow from="50,50" to="250,50" curve="0.8" >}}

### Maximum Curve (curve=1)

```markdown
{{</* arrow from="50,50" to="250,50" curve="1" */>}}
```

{{< arrow from="50,50" to="250,50" curve="1" >}}

## Bend Direction

Use `bend` to control which direction the curve bends.

### Bend Left (default)

```markdown
{{</* arrow from="50,50" to="250,50" curve="0.5" bend="left" */>}}
```

{{< arrow from="50,50" to="250,50" curve="0.5" bend="left" >}}

### Bend Right

```markdown
{{</* arrow from="50,50" to="250,50" curve="0.5" bend="right" */>}}
```

{{< arrow from="50,50" to="250,50" curve="0.5" bend="right" >}}

## Bend with Angles

Specify exact bend angle in degrees.

### 45 Degrees

```markdown
{{</* arrow from="50,50" to="250,50" curve="0.5" bend="45" */>}}
```

{{< arrow from="50,50" to="250,50" curve="0.5" bend="45" >}}

### 135 Degrees

```markdown
{{</* arrow from="50,50" to="250,50" curve="0.5" bend="135" */>}}
```

{{< arrow from="50,50" to="250,50" curve="0.5" bend="135" >}}

### -45 Degrees

```markdown
{{</* arrow from="50,50" to="250,50" curve="0.5" bend="-45" */>}}
```

{{< arrow from="50,50" to="250,50" curve="0.5" bend="-45" >}}

## Diagonal Arrows

Curve and bend work with any arrow direction.

### Diagonal Down-Right

```markdown
{{</* arrow from="50,30" to="250,100" curve="0.5" bend="left" color="blue" */>}}
```

{{< arrow from="50,30" to="250,100" curve="0.5" bend="left" color="blue" >}}

```markdown
{{</* arrow from="50,30" to="250,100" curve="0.5" bend="right" color="red" */>}}
```

{{< arrow from="50,30" to="250,100" curve="0.5" bend="right" color="red" >}}

### Diagonal Up-Right

```markdown
{{</* arrow from="50,100" to="250,30" curve="0.5" bend="left" color="green" */>}}
```

{{< arrow from="50,100" to="250,30" curve="0.5" bend="left" color="green" >}}

```markdown
{{</* arrow from="50,100" to="250,30" curve="0.5" bend="right" color="purple" */>}}
```

{{< arrow from="50,100" to="250,30" curve="0.5" bend="right" color="purple" >}}

## Vertical Arrows

```markdown
{{</* arrow from="50,20" to="50,120" curve="0.5" bend="left" */>}}
```

{{< arrow from="50,20" to="50,120" curve="0.5" bend="left" >}}

```markdown
{{</* arrow from="150,20" to="150,120" curve="0.5" bend="right" */>}}
```

{{< arrow from="150,20" to="150,120" curve="0.5" bend="right" >}}

## Combined with Labels

```markdown
{{</* arrow from="50,50" to="250,50" curve="0.6" label="Easy curves!" */>}}
```

{{< arrow from="50,50" to="250,50" curve="0.6" label="Easy curves!" >}}

## Combined with Styling

```markdown
{{</* arrow from="50,50" to="250,50" curve="0.5" bend="left" color="crimson" head="stealth" width="3" */>}}
```

{{< arrow from="50,50" to="250,50" curve="0.5" bend="left" color="crimson" head="stealth" width="3" >}}

```markdown
{{</* arrow from="50,50" to="250,50" curve="0.7" bend="right" color="steelblue" line="double" */>}}
```

{{< arrow from="50,50" to="250,50" curve="0.7" bend="right" color="steelblue" line="double" >}}

## Manual vs Auto

Compare manual control points with the simplified `curve` parameter.

### Manual (control1)

```markdown
{{</* arrow from="50,80" to="250,80" control1="150,20" color="gray" */>}}
```

{{< arrow from="50,80" to="250,80" control1="150,20" color="gray" >}}

### Auto (curve + bend)

```markdown
{{</* arrow from="50,80" to="250,80" curve="0.6" bend="left" color="teal" */>}}
```

{{< arrow from="50,80" to="250,80" curve="0.6" bend="left" color="teal" >}}

## Multiple Waypoints

Use `waypoints` to create complex paths through multiple points.

### Basic Waypoints (smooth)

```markdown
{{</* arrow from="30,50" to="270,50" waypoints="100,20; 150,80; 200,20" */>}}
```

{{< arrow from="30,50" to="270,50" waypoints="100,20; 150,80; 200,20" >}}

### Zigzag Path (smooth=false)

```markdown
{{</* arrow from="30,50" to="270,50" waypoints="100,20; 150,80; 200,20" smooth="false" */>}}
```

{{< arrow from="30,50" to="270,50" waypoints="100,20; 150,80; 200,20" smooth="false" >}}

### Complex Path

```markdown
{{</* arrow from="30,80" to="270,80" waypoints="80,30; 120,100; 180,30; 220,100" color="purple" */>}}
```

{{< arrow from="30,80" to="270,80" waypoints="80,30; 120,100; 180,30; 220,100" color="purple" >}}

### Staircase Pattern

```markdown
{{</* arrow from="30,100" to="270,20" waypoints="80,100; 80,60; 150,60; 150,20; 220,20" smooth="false" color="steelblue" */>}}
```

{{< arrow from="30,100" to="270,20" waypoints="80,100; 80,60; 150,60; 150,20; 220,20" smooth="false" color="steelblue" >}}

### Smooth Staircase

```markdown
{{</* arrow from="30,100" to="270,20" waypoints="80,100; 80,60; 150,60; 150,20; 220,20" color="teal" */>}}
```

{{< arrow from="30,100" to="270,20" waypoints="80,100; 80,60; 150,60; 150,20; 220,20" color="teal" >}}

### Loop Around

```markdown
{{</* arrow from="30,60" to="270,60" waypoints="80,20; 180,20; 180,100; 80,100; 80,60" color="crimson" head="stealth" */>}}
```

{{< arrow from="30,60" to="270,60" waypoints="80,20; 180,20; 180,100; 80,100; 80,60" color="crimson" head="stealth" >}}

### Many Waypoints

```markdown
{{</* arrow from="20,50" to="280,50" waypoints="60,30; 100,70; 140,30; 180,70; 220,30" color="orange" width="3" */>}}
```

{{< arrow from="20,50" to="280,50" waypoints="60,30; 100,70; 140,30; 180,70; 220,30" color="orange" width="3" >}}
